claim: Utilize Instagram for discovery, as 36% of young professionals discover venues through social media, and 53% choose venues by word of mouth.
why_it_works: Social proof and social networks drive discovery and decision-making for this segment.
dont: Never rely solely on algorithmic exploration for discovery

claim: Leverage WhatsApp groups for word-of-mouth and social proof, as 53% of young professionals choose venues based on recommendations from friends and family.
why_it_works: Social facilitation and social proof drive spending and decision-making for this segment.
dont: Avoid using WhatsApp for promotional broadcasts without opt-in

claim: Optimize Zomato and Swiggy listings for discovery, as young professionals use these platforms for venue discovery and exploration.
why_it_works: Convenience and social exposure drive discovery and decision-making for this segment.
dont: Never neglect to claim and optimize listings on these platforms
